# does, its entity interface, pipeline wiring, and design decisions.
###############################################################################

---

## Section 1: Domain Overview

The garden domain monitors outdoor utility devices that run on schedules
or conditions. Currently covers the pond/fountain pump only.

### Design Principle

The garden domain follows the **canonical alert pipeline** defined in
ALERTS_CONTRACT.md. It does not send notifications directly — all delivery
goes through `alert.garden_alert → STD_Alerts` and `script.notify_system_event`.

### Out of Scope (explicit)

| Topic | Owner |
|---|---|
| Pool pump solar scheduling | `packages/power/power_automations.yaml` (pool_pump_solar_control) |
| Pool power alerts | `packages/alerts/alerts_power.yaml` |
| Garden lighting | `packages/lighting/` |
| Water / borehole | `packages/water/` + `packages/alerts/alerts_water.yaml` |

---

## Section 2: File Inventory

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `packages/alerts/alerts_garden.yaml` | ~120 | Full garden alert pipeline: binary sensor, context sensor, alert entity, mobile action automation |

No separate `packages/garden/` directory exists — garden is alert-only for now.
If irrigation or pool chemistry is added, create `packages/garden/` then.

---

## Section 3: Pipeline Architecture

```
switch.sonoff_pond_fountain_pump = on
  AND time >= 11:00
  AND input_boolean.garden_alert_notify = on
        ↓ (1 min delay_on, 5 min delay_off)
binary_sensor.garden_alert_active
        ↓
sensor.garden_alert_context  (state: warning / normal)
        ↓
alert.garden_alert  (repeat: 60 min, STD_Alerts notifier)
        ↓
sensor.alert_device_entities  (aggregator — alerts_summary.yaml)
        ↓
sensor.global_alert_context  → dashboard + notification scripts
```

Mobile action response:
```
alert.garden_alert notification → user taps "Turn Off Pump"
        ↓ (event: mobile_app_notification_action, action: TURN_OFF_POND_PUMP)
automation.garden_alert_ack_turn_off_pond_pump
        ↓
switch.turn_off: switch.sonoff_pond_fountain_pump
        ↓
script.notify_system_event (info: "Pond pump turned off via mobile action")
```

### Aggregator Name Resolution

`sensor.garden_alert_context` → base strip → `garden` →
- Candidate 1: `alert.garden` (does not exist)
- Candidate 2: `alert.garden_alert` ✅ (exists)

---

## Section 4: Entity Registry

### Helpers

| Entity | Type | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `input_boolean.garden_alert_notify` | input_boolean | `true` | Suppress gate — OFF silences all garden alerts without HA restart |

### Binary Sensors

| Entity | Delay ON | Delay OFF | Logic |
|---|---|---|---|
| `binary_sensor.garden_alert_active` | 1 min | 5 min | pond pump ON + hour ≥ 11 + notify enabled |

### Template Sensors

| Entity | States | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `sensor.garden_alert_context` | `warning` / `normal` | Aggregator feed; carries domain/devices/duration attributes |

### Alert Entities

| Entity | Trigger | Repeat | Notifier | Ack |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `alert.garden_alert` | `binary_sensor.garden_alert_active` | 60 min | `STD_Alerts` | ✅ |

### Automations

| ID | Alias | Trigger | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| `garden_alert_ack_turn_off_pond_pump` | Garden Alert: Turn Off Pond Pump | `mobile_app_notification_action` event, action: `TURN_OFF_POND_PUMP` | Turn off pump + notify info |

### Switch (hardware — not defined here)

| Entity | Integration | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `switch.sonoff_pond_fountain_pump` | Sonoff/EWElink | Pond/fountain pump. Schedule managed externally (HA timer or Sonoff app). |

---

## Section 5: Pipeline Audit

| Stage | Entity | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Suppress toggle | `input_boolean.garden_alert_notify` | ✅ |
| Binary sensor | `binary_sensor.garden_alert_active` | ✅ delay_on 1 min, delay_off 5 min |
| Context sensor | `sensor.garden_alert_context` | ✅ warning/normal, devices attribute |
| Alert entity | `alert.garden_alert` | ✅ STD_Alerts, 60 min repeat |
| In aggregator trigger | `alerts_summary.yaml` trigger list | ✅ added 2026-04-29 |
| Mobile action handler | `garden_alert_ack_turn_off_pond_pump` | ✅ proper event trigger |

**PASS.**

---

## Section 6: Must NOT

- **Do not control pump schedules here** — that belongs in power/garden automation files.
- **Do not duplicate pool pump logic** — `pool_pump_solar_control` owns solar-driven pool scheduling.
- **Do not call `notify.STD_*` directly** — all delivery through `alert.garden_alert → STD_Alerts`.
- **Do not add a second `garden_alert_notify` suppress gate** per alert entity — one boolean covers the whole domain.

---

## Section 7: Migration Note

The original automation `Alert Pond Pump Unscheduled Turn on` (id: `1742999668407`)
in `automations.yaml` had two defects:

1. `wait_for_trigger` and `service: switch.turn_off` were nested inside the
   `notify.mobile_app_iphone16promax_ryan` `data:` block — structurally invalid,
   silently ignored by HA.
2. Direct `notify.mobile_app_iphone16promax_ryan` call bypassed quiet hours and
   Telegram delivery.

Both defects are corrected in this package implementation.

---

## Section 8: Future Scope

| Feature | Trigger entity | Alert target | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| Pool chemistry alert | `sensor.pool_ph` / `sensor.pool_chlorine` | `alert.garden_alert` or new `alert.pool_chemistry_alert` | Needs sensor hardware |
| Pool level alert | `sensor.pool_level` | `alert.garden_alert` | Needs level sensor |
| Irrigation fault | `binary_sensor.irrigation_fault` | New `alert.irrigation_alert` | Needs irrigation package |

When pool/irrigation sensors are added, evaluate whether they belong in
`alerts_garden.yaml` or warrant their own file (e.g. `alerts_pool.yaml`).
